task: Send an email to kiu@ikangai.com with the subject 'Weekly status update' and body 'Hi, please find attached the weekly status update. All milestones on track.' using the send_reply.sh script. Write the command output to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Send an email to kiu@ikangai.com with CC to team@ikangai.com, subject 'Q2 Planning meeting', body 'Scheduling the Q2 planning session for next Wednesday at 2pm CET. Please confirm availability.' Use send_reply.sh. Write the command to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Send an email to kiu@ikangai.com about project deadline extension. Do NOT use the system 'mail' or 'sendmail' commands — use the configured email tools. Write what command you used to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Launch neomutt to check the inbox. If it connects successfully, write 'CONNECTED' to /tmp/clive/result.txt. If it fails to connect, write the error message to /tmp/clive/result.txt. After checking, quit neomutt with q.

Send an email to kiu@ikangai.com with subject 'Re: Q&A session — München office' and body 'What\'s the plan for the München offsite? Budget is €5,000.' using send_reply.sh. Write the command to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Open neomutt and search for emails containing 'invoice' in the subject line. List the matching email subjects to /tmp/clive/result.txt, one per line. Quit neomutt when done.

Forward the most recent email in the inbox to kiu@ikangai.com with an added note 'FYI — see below for context on the project timeline.' using neomutt. Write 'FORWARDED' to /tmp/clive/result.txt when done.
Open neomutt, find the most recent email, and reply with 'Thank you, I will review this and get back to you by end of day.' Quit neomutt after sending. Write 'REPLIED' to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Create a file /tmp/clive/report.txt with content 'Q2 Revenue: €1.2M'. Then send it as an attachment to kiu@ikangai.com with subject 'Q2 Report attached'. Use the configured email tools. Write the send command to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Open neomutt and count the number of unread emails in the inbox. Write just the count to /tmp/clive/result.txt. Quit neomutt when done.
Open neomutt, flag the most recent email as important, then quit. Write 'FLAGGED' to /tmp/clive/result.txt when done.

Send an email to kiu@ikangai.com and team@ikangai.com (both in To:) with subject 'Sprint retrospective notes' and body 'Please review the attached retro notes before Friday standup.' Use send_reply.sh. Write the command to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
Open neomutt, find an email with an attachment, and save the attachment to /tmp/clive/. Write the saved filename to /tmp/clive/result.txt. Quit neomutt when done.
Draft a professional email to kiu@ikangai.com declining a meeting invitation politely, suggesting alternative dates next week. Save the draft text to /tmp/clive/result.txt before sending.
Open neomutt, find the longest email thread (most replies), and write a one-paragraph summary of the thread's topic to /tmp/clive/result.txt. Quit neomutt when done.
